arts.ttl: Rangers fan dies in Istanbul traffic accident before Europa League game
arts.sum: Ibrox club announced news in statement on Thursday Rangers are playing Fenerbahce in Europa League match A Rangers supporter has died in a road traffic accident in Istanbul before the team’s Europa League last-16 game with Fenerbahce at the Sukru Saracoglu Stadium. The Ibrox club announced the news in a statement on Thursday morning. “We are devastated to have learned of the passing of one of our supporters in a road traffic accident overnight in Istanbul,” it read. “The immediate thoughts of everyone at the club are with their family and friends at this incredibly difficult time. Continue reading...
